Bailey joins Bloomberg Intelligence’s Nicole D’Souza on this episode of the Tech Disruptors podcast to discuss how dating-app behavior is changing after the pandemic, why Gen Z women are central to Tinder’s strategy, and how AI, product updates and helping users connect in real life

summary: Freight markets are tightening in ways not seen since deregulation, driven more by shrinking capacity than surging demand. In this Talking Transports podcast, Triumph Financial founder & CEO Aaron Graft joins Bloomberg Intelligence’s senior transportation and logistics analyst Lee Klaskow and Bloomberg Intelligence midcap banks analyst Eric Bedell to discuss how regulatory enforcement, rising insurance costs, and increased scrutiny of carrier compliance are reshaping trucking economics. summary: Japan’s journey back to nuclear power is entering a new phase. Fifteen years after the Fukushima disaster and the shuttering of the country’s nuclear fleet, the return of the Kashiwazaki Kariwa 6 reactor marks the first restart in the Tokyo power region and one of the most significant additions since 2011. The timing is critical. Japan remains heavily reliant on imported LNG, leaving its power prices exposed to global gas shocks and disruptions from the war in the Middle East. Nuclear restarts a

title: Stocks Gain on Optimism Over US-Iran Deal to Open Hormuz

title: Powell Will Vote With His Mind and Heart, Daco Says
title_cn: 达科表示，鲍威尔将全心全意地投票
summary: Gregory Daco, EY-Parthenon chief economist, says he thinks former Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell will not be afraid to dissent as a member of the board of governors. Daco speaks on "Bloomberg Surveillance." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Natural Gas Rises on Lower Output, Higher Flows to LNG Plants
title_cn: 美国天然气产量下降、液化天然气工厂流量增加，价格上涨
summary: US natural gas futures increased as producers reduced output over the US holiday weekend and more domestic gas supplies flowed to liquefied natural gas export terminals on the Gulf Coast. Some of those facilities had previously lowered capacity to perform seasonal maintenance, pushing more gas into the domestic market.

title: First Brands Hit by $286 Million Claim for Alleged Tariffs Fraud
title_cn: First Brands 因涉嫌关税欺诈而遭受 2.86 亿美元索赔
summary: The US government has joined the line of creditors impacted by alleged fraud at bankrupt auto-parts maker First Brands, in this instance for accusations the company cheated on how much it should have paid on tariffs.

title: Irish Government Agrees Bill to Ban Israeli Settlement Trade
title_cn: 爱尔兰政府同意禁止以色列定居点贸易法案
summary: Ireland’s cabinet agreed to put a bill to parliament that proposes a ban on the trade of goods with Israeli settlements in the occupied Palestinian territory.

title: Fed’s Case for Cutting Rates ‘Very, Very Weak,' Bill Dudley Says

summary: Bill Dudley, former New York Fed President and Bloomberg Opinion columnist, examines the effectiveness of Federal Reserve policy and the central bank’s credibility on inflation. His opinions are his own. (Source: Bloomberg)

title_cn: 美伊冲突和平协议前景黯淡，油价反弹
summary: Oil rebounded as fresh clashes between the US and Iran clouded the outlook for an interim deal to reopen the vital Strait of Hormuz.

title_cn: 欧洲央行将“竭尽全力”抑制通胀：Sleijpen
summary: The European Central Bank will do whatever is needed to bring consumer-price growth back to target, with officials to have much more information at June’s meeting as they formulate their plans, Governing Council member Olaf Sleijpen said.

title: BP Fires Board Chair on Governance Concerns Only Months Into Job

title_cn: Bessent 阻止国债收益率攀升的选择有限
summary: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent is facing what may become his biggest financial-market test yet, in the form of a steady increase in benchmark Treasury yields that’s generating economic headwinds and leaving him with few easy options.

title: Goldman Analysts Say UK Homebuilder Selloff Has Gone Too Far
title_cn: 高盛分析师称英国房屋建筑商抛售过度
summary: Goldman Sachs Group Inc. says the selloff in UK homebuilder stocks has been excessive and investors are too pessimistic on the sector’s long-term profitability.

title_cn: 肯尼亚计划发行 7.72 亿美元绿色债券以提高农业产量
summary: Kenya plans 100 billion shillings ($772 million) of green bonds to boost agricultural production, climate resilience and competitiveness.

title: PGIM Backs $4 Billion of US Land-Bank Deals in Asset-Based Push
title_cn: PGIM 支持 40 亿美元的美国土地储备交易以资产为基础
summary: Prudential Financial Inc.’s asset-management arm has financed about $4 billion of land-banking projects through a partnership with Domain Real Estate Partners, part of a push to gain exposure to the US homebuilding industry.

title: Global Bond Market Risks with Pooja Kumra
title_cn: Pooja Kumra 的全球债券市场风险
summary: In a May 26, 2026 interview, Pooja Kumra, Senior European and UK Rates Strategist at TD Securities, discussed how global bond markets are reacting to higher oil prices, lingering stagflation fears, and fiscal concerns. She noted that recent yield moves are driven more by real yields than inflation expectations, with long-end bond markets carrying much of the stagflation premium. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Markets Weigh Strait Reopening: Franklin Templeton's Dudley
title_cn: 市场权衡海峡重新开放：富兰克林邓普顿的达德利
summary: Katrina Dudley, Senior Investment Strategist at Franklin Templeton, discussed the market's current focus on a potential de-escalation trade linked to the reopening of a key strait, which is critical for easing inflation pressures driven by elevated energy prices. She highlighted that persistent high oil prices, about $30 above pre-war levels for three months, are fueling inflation expectations and impacting consumers directly, as evidenced by sticker shock at gas pumps and rising grocery prices. Dudley noted that consumer inflation expectations remain elevated above market forecasts, signaling a shift from viewing inflation as transient to more permanent. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: European Stocks Decline on US-Iran Tensions Worries; BP Slumps
title_cn: 欧洲股市因美伊紧张局势担忧而下跌；血压暴跌
summary: European stocks fell Tuesday, snapping a six-day winning streak, as traders grew concerned that a US-Iran peace deal will remain elusive.

title: Crypto Exchange OKX Makes AI Skills a Part of Worker Evaluations

summary: Crypto exchange OKX is taking a page from the playbook of the tech and finance industries by linking employee evaluations to proficiency in using artificial intelligence.

summary: Russia’s key Black Sea oil export terminal, targeted by Ukrainian drones over the weekend, is loading crude, according to satellite data.

summary: S&P 500 Index futures rise 0.6% as of 7:47 a.m. in New York as investors remained hopeful that the latest American strikes on Iran won’t derail talks to end the Middle East conflict.

title: US, Iran Clash Near Hormuz as Both Tout Progress on Talks
title_cn: 美国和伊朗在霍尔木兹海峡附近发生冲突，双方都宣称会谈取得进展
summary: US and Iranian forces clashed near the Strait of Hormuz overnight, hours after US President Donald Trump reiterated that negotiations with Tehran to extend their ceasefire and reopen the strait were proceeding, and just before a published statement from Iran’s Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei. Tyler Kendall reports on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Activist Ancora Pushes H.B. Fuller to Drop Bid for UK’s AMS

summary: Activist investor Ancora Holdings Group is pushing US adhesives maker H.B. Fuller Co. to abandon a proposed takeover of UK-based Advanced Medical Solutions Group Plc.

title: SEBI Plans New Measures to Deepen India’s Corporate Bond Market
title_cn: SEBI 计划采取新措施深化印度公司债券市场
summary: India’s capital markets regulator is working on measures to strengthen the local-currency bond segment as it seeks to cut companies’ reliance on bank loans and support the nation’s push towards a developed economy.

summary: Employees at Elon Musk’s xAI were warned by the company’s top lawyer to carefully moderate their interactions with workers from Cursor — a directive that came weeks after Musk’s firm announced a possible deal to acquire the AI coding startup.

title: Revel to Merge With EQT-Backed Voltera, Uniting EV Charging Networks
title_cn: Revel 将与 EQT 支持的 Voltera 合并，联合电动汽车充电网络
summary: Private equity-backed Voltera and Revel Transit Inc. have agreed to merge their electric-vehicle charging businesses to serve ride-hail cars and robotaxis across urban areas in the US.

title_cn: 瑞银将美光科技提高至最高目标
summary: UBS raised its price target on Micron to a Street-high view of $1,625, up from $535. Mandeep Singh has more on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Xiaomi Profit Drops More Than Expected in Memory Chip Crunch
title_cn: 内存芯片紧缺，小米利润降幅超预期
summary: Xiaomi Corp.’s quarterly profit tanked more than anticipated after sharp increases in memory prices exacted a heavy toll on the Chinese firm’s smartphone business.

title: Google’s Fitbit Air Gives Whoop Some Serious Competition
title_cn: 谷歌的 Fitbit Air 给 Whoop 带来了激烈的竞争
summary: The Fitbit Air, a new $100 screenless wearable from Alphabet Inc.’s Google, represents a major evolution in what consumers can expect from fitness trackers as tech companies race into an era of personalized health and artificial intelligence-powered wellness insights.

title: Patrick Drahi Swiss Assets Seized in Spat With Altice Co-Founder

summary: Patrick Drahi’s spat with Altice co-founder Armando Pereira has escalated after Swiss courts ordered the seizure of assets following a lawsuit by the latter to reclaim at least 1.2 billion francs ($1.5 billion) he claims he’s owed.

title: AP CEO Defends Swatch Collaboration
title_cn: AP 首席执行官捍卫 Swatch 合作
summary: Audemars Piguet's recent collaboration with Swatch led to scuffles outside stores from New York to Paris to Milan, as crowds queued for hours to get their hands on the Royal Pop pocket watch collection. Despite criticism that the collaboration could 'cheapen' the brand, CEO Ilaria Resta says it has made AP more accessible to a younger audience, while the thing she fears most is 'irrelevance'. She spoke on 'The Pulse with Francine Lacqua' on Bloomberg TV.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: There Aren’t Enough GPUs on Earth — Let Alone for Space

summary: SpaceX’s IPO filing warns that current AI chip supply may be insufficient for its long-term orbital compute ambitions

title: Logistics Firm Stord Nabs $250 Million to Help Brands Take On Amazon

summary: Stord Inc., a logistics technology startup, raised $250 million in a new funding round to expand its fulfillment operation and help merchants better compete with Amazon.com Inc.

title: Kenya in Talks With Karpowership for Emergency Power Supply

summary: Kenya plans to contract Karpowership, the world’s biggest provider of ship-mounted electricity plants, to provide emergency power for the nation’s growing demands.

summary: A rally in Nokia Oyj is forcing investors to reconsider the company not as an old telecom-equipment stock, but as part of the infrastructure underpinning the artificial intelligence boom.

summary: BNP Paribas SA is working with French artificial intelligence startup Mistral AI and other partners to prepare for cybersecurity threats posed by new models such as Anthropic PBC’s Mythos.

title: China Expands Travel Curbs to Top AI Talent at Private Firms

summary: China is restricting overseas travel for top AI professionals in private firms such as Alibaba Group Holding Ltd. and DeepSeek, suggesting an escalation in measures intended to safeguard its technology and catch up to the US in a pivotal sphere.

title: ING’s ‘Vibe Coding’ AI Is Building Its New Trading Systems

summary: ING Groep NV is turning to “vibe coding” to build electronic trading tools for currencies and credit, its latest use of artificial intelligence to compete with larger peers.

title: AI Vs Economy Disconnect Getting Larger: 3-Minutes MLIV
title_cn: 人工智能与经济的脱节越来越大：3 分钟 MLIV
summary: Joumanna Bercetche, Tom Mackenzie and Mark Cudmore break down today's key themes for analysts and investors on "Bloomberg: The Opening Trade."  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: ‘KPop Demon Hunters’ Studio Draws Tencent Music Investment
title_cn: 《KPop Demon Hunters》工作室获腾讯音乐投资
summary: The Black Label Inc., the studio behind the soundtrack for Netflix Inc.’s KPop Demon Hunters, raised about 120 billion won ($80 million) of expansion capital from major entertainment names including Tencent Holdings Ltd.’s music arm.

title: Samsung’s Non-Chip Staff Seek Court Order to Block Wage Vote
title_cn: 三星非芯片员工寻求法院命令阻止工资投票
summary: A Samsung Electronics Co. union representing workers outside the ultra-profitable semiconductor division asked a Korean court to block voting on a tentative deal that would distribute about 40 trillion won ($26.6 billion) in bonuses to chip employees.

title: Chip Bonus Boom Raises Inflation, Housing Risks for BOK, BE Says
title_cn: BE表示，筹码红利繁荣加剧了韩国央行的通胀和住房风险
summary: Samsung Electronics Co.’s bonus deal with workers risks turning South Korea’s AI-driven chip boom into a new source of inflation and housing-market pressure that the Bank of Korea will have to address, according to Bloomberg Economics.

title: RedNote-Backer GSR Seeks to Raise $350 Million New Fund
title_cn: RedNote 资助者 GSR 寻求筹集 3.5 亿美元新基金
summary: GSR Ventures Management Co., an early investor in Chinese social media app RedNote, is seeking investors for a new fund, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Infratil CEO Sees ‘Latent Potential’ for Data Centers in ANZ
title_cn: Infratil 首席执行官看到 ANZ 数据中心的“潜在潜力”
summary: The artificial intelligence infrastructure boom is the biggest growth trend in recent years, with Infratil Ltd. Chief Executive Officer Jason Boyes seeing plenty of “latent potential” for new data center development in Australia and New Zealand.

title: Huawei Touts Chip Breakthrough to Shorten Gap With TSMC
title_cn: 华为吹捧芯片突破以缩小与台积电的差距
summary: Huawei says it's come up with a new pathway to shorten its gap with industry leader TSMC, potentially achieving a breakthrough in making advanced semiconductors without cutting-edge equipment. Bloomberg Intelligence's Robert Lea explains. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: China Stocks in Hong Kong Rise, Shrugging Off Trading Crackdown
title_cn: 香港中概股上涨，摆脱交易打击
summary: Chinese shares listed in Hong Kong rose after returning from a holiday, as investors brushed aside Beijing’s most forceful crackdown on illicit cross-border stock trading to chase tech gains.

title: Chinese Chip Stocks Rise in Hong Kong on Hopes for Huawei Tech
title_cn: 由于对华为技术的希望，中国芯片股在香港上涨
summary: Chinese semiconductor stocks rose in Hong Kong on optimism over a potential breakthrough in technology by Huawei Technologies Co.

title: These AI Gurus Are Charging Wall Street Banks $25,000 a Day
title_cn: 这些人工智能专家每天向华尔街银行收取 25,000 美元的费用
summary: Global banks are pouring billions into artificial intelligence yet struggling to automate workflows. Two ex-bankers say they are being hired to ignite the shift.

title: Iran Restores Partial Internet Access After Months of Blackout
title_cn: 伊朗在停电数月后恢复部分互联网接入
summary: Iran started restoring access to the internet — a sign that the longest shutdown of its kind in history is easing amid a diplomatic push to end the war with the US.

title: Texas Voters Get Last Say After Trump Backs Paxton in Runoff
title_cn: 特朗普在决选中支持帕克斯顿后，德克萨斯州选民获得最后发言权
summary: Republican voters in Texas get their final say Tuesday in a drawn out, vitriolic and expensive primary campaign for a US Senate seat, a race that Democrats are watching closely in hopes that they could flip both houses of Congress in November.

title: Chile’s New Government Cries Foul Over Past Debt Projections
title_cn: 智利新政府对过去的债务预测表示不满
summary: Chile’s new government said it’s facing a steeper fiscal challenge than even it had anticipated, claiming the previous administration of President Gabriel Boric had overestimated revenue and turned a blind eye to some expenses.

title: US and Iran Clash Near Hormuz as Talks Go ‘Back and Forth’
title_cn: 美国和伊朗在霍尔木兹海峡附近发生冲突，谈判“来回”
summary: US and Iranian forces clashed near the Strait of Hormuz overnight, highlighting the tension between the two sides even as they tout progress toward an interim peace deal.

title: Senegal Dollar Bonds Slump as Political Standoff Deepens
title_cn: 随着政治僵局加深，塞内加尔美元债券暴跌
summary: Senegal’s dollar bonds fell sharply as investors digested days of political turmoil after the West African nation’s prime minister was fired and then swiftly returned to a position of power that could undermine President Bassirou Diomaye Faye.

title: Dutch Block US Takeover of Cloud Services Provider Solvinity
title_cn: 荷兰阻止美国收购云服务提供商 Solvinity
summary: The Dutch government blocked a proposed takeover of Solvinity Group BV, a provider of cloud services in the Netherlands, by US-based Kyndryl, citing security concerns.

title: Putin Steps Up Kyiv Missile Strikes Seeking New Momentum in War
title_cn: 普京加大基辅导弹打击力度，寻求战争新动力
summary: With the battlefield largely at a stalemate, Russia is ramping up ballistic missile attacks on Ukraine to try to regain the strategic initiative by overwhelming air defenses and demoralizing its population.

title: Kremlin Names Top Business Lobby Chief as Putin’s New Ombudsman
title_cn: 克里姆林宫任命高级商业游说首长为普京的新监察员
summary: The Kremlin said Alexander Shokhin, head of the lobby group representing major industries in Russia, will become President Vladimir Putin’s new business ombudsman.

title: Rubio Unveils Indo-Pacific Monitor Plan as Hormuz Crisis Deepens
title_cn: 随着霍尔木兹危机加深，卢比奥公布印度太平洋监测计划
summary: The US, Japan, India and Australia launched a maritime surveillance initiative for the Indo-Pacific region as the Hormuz crisis deepens. Debjit Chakraborty explains how the high-profile summit aims to counter growing threats to commerce. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Spanish Probe Into Ex-Leader Is Hurting Sánchez’s Government
title_cn: 西班牙对前领导人的调查正在伤害桑切斯政府
summary: When Spanish Prime Minister Pedro Sánchez overturned a significant polling deficit to hold on to power in 2023, his Socialist predecessor José Luis Rodríguez Zapatero was a crucial ally on the campaign trail. Three years later, Zapatero’s legal troubles are threatening the Socialist leader’s bid for reelection next year.

title: Fresh Clashes Highlight US-Iran Tensions Despite Talks Progress
title_cn: 尽管谈判取得进展，但新的冲突凸显了美伊紧张局势
summary: US and Iranian forces clashed near the Strait of Hormuz overnight, even as they tout progress toward an interim peace deal. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Rubio Unveils Indo-Pacific Monitor Plan as Hormuz Crisis Deepens
title_cn: 随着霍尔木兹危机加深，卢比奥公布印度太平洋监测计划
summary: The US, Japan, India and Australia on Tuesday launched a maritime surveillance initiative for the Indo-Pacific region, among other measures, as the countries’ foreign ministers gathered in New Delhi for a high-profile summit aimed at countering growing threats to commerce.

title: Texas Senate Showdown Latest Test of Trump’s Sway
title_cn: 德克萨斯州参议院摊牌对特朗普影响力的最新考验
summary: The runoff pits a longstanding GOP senator against a Trump-backed ‘fighter’

title: Italy’s Meloni Says EU Bureaucrats Stifle Economic Growth
title_cn: 意大利总理梅洛尼称欧盟官僚扼杀经济增长
summary: Italian Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni accused the European Union of restricting the bloc’s ability to grow and be competitive on the world stage.

title: South African Leader Challenges Cash-in-Sofa Report in Court
title_cn: 南非领导人在法庭上质疑现金沙发报告
summary: South African President Cyril Ramaphosa filed a lawsuit that aims to stop parliament from instituting impeachment proceedings against him, arguing that the process stemmed from the findings of an advisory panel which erred when it found he may have committed serious violations in his handling of a robbery at his wildlife ranch.

title: Senegal’s Dismissed Premier Sonko Elected Speaker of Parliament
title_cn: 塞内加尔被解职总理桑科当选议长
summary: Senegalese lawmakers reinstated Ousmane Sonko as a lawmaker and then elected him as speaker of the National Assembly, days after President Bassirou Diomaye Faye abruptly dismissed him as prime minister in a split that has fractured the ruling coalition.

title: China Plays Quiet Role in US-Iran Talks
title_cn: 中国在美伊谈判中扮演安静角色
summary: Beijing’s close ties with Pakistan help it influence negotiations to end the Iran war.

title: Lula’s Stimulus Machine Is Steamrolling Brazil’s Sky-High Interest Rates
title_cn: 卢拉的刺激机器正在压垮巴西的高利率
summary: When President Luiz Inácio Lula da Silva’s senior officials convene on Mondays to discuss Brazil’s most pressing government business, one rule is clear: keep quiet if you’re not advocating for stimulus.

title: Russia Tells US to Evacuate Its Diplomats and Citizens From Kyiv
title_cn: 俄罗斯要求美国从基辅撤离其外交官和公民
summary: Russian Foreign Minister Sergei Lavrov advised US Secretary of State Marco Rubio to evacuate US citizens and diplomats from Kyiv as the Kremlin plans to continue heavy strikes on the Ukrainian capital, the Foreign Ministry in Moscow said.

title: Iran’s Khamenei Says No Going Back for Middle East Rocked by War
title_cn: 伊朗哈梅内伊称中东地区不会因战争而后退
summary: Iran’s Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei said US military bases in the Middle East will no longer be safe after the war, declaring victory and a new regional order even as talks to end the conflict continued.

title: North Korea Fires Ballistic Missiles in Latest Weapons Test
title_cn: 朝鲜在最新的武器测试中发射弹道导弹
summary: North Korea fired multiple projectiles including short-range ballistic missiles on Tuesday, South Korea’s military said, the latest in a series of weapons tests by Pyongyang so far this year.

title: Japan Sends Officials to Russia to ‘Facilitate Communication’
title_cn: 日本派官员前往俄罗斯“促进沟通”
summary: Japan has sent senior officials to Russia to keep communication channels open and protect the assets of Japanese companies operating there, in what Tokyo says is the latest in a series of visits that have taken place since the war in Ukraine began.

title: S. Korea to Deploy Locally Built Nuclear Submarine by Late-2030s
title_cn: 韩国将在 2030 年代末部署本土建造的核潜艇
summary: South Korea unveiled a roadmap to develop nuclear-powered submarines and deploy the first vessel by the late 2030s, as President Lee Jae Myung convened a new defense strategy council Tuesday focused on strengthening the nation’s military autonomy.

title: US Strikes Iran as Trump Says Talks 'Proceeding Nicely' | Daybreak Europe 05/26/2026
title_cn: 特朗普称会谈“进展顺利”，美国打击伊朗欧洲黎明 05/26/2026
summary:
Bloomberg Daybreak Europe is your essential morning viewing to stay ahead. Live from London, we set the agenda for your day, catching you up with overnight markets news from the US and Asia. And we'll tell you what matters for investors in Europe, giving you insight before trading begins.

US and Israeli jets struck Iranian vessels in the Strait of Hormuz and other targets, hours after President Donald Trump had suggested negotiations with Tehran over an interim deal were progressing.

The attack took place south of Larak Island in the Strait of Hormuz, with several Iranian personnel killed, Iran’s state-run Nour News reported, without providing further details. Trump earlier said negotiations between the US and Iran over an agreement to extend their ceasefire and reopen the strait were “proceeding nicely.”

Today's guest: Shriya Samarth, StoneX, EMEA Head of Rates. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: China Defense Minister Expected to Skip Singapore Forum Again
title_cn: 中国国防部长预计将再次缺席新加坡论坛
summary: China’s top military official is expected to skip Asia’s biggest defense forum for a second year in a row, according to people familiar with the matter, ceding to the US and its allies an opportunity for public defense diplomacy.

title: RBI, Rating Firms Assess Iran War Risks on Indian Companies
title_cn: 印度储备银行和评级公司评估印度公司面临的伊朗战争风险
summary: The Reserve Bank of India has held discussions with local credit-rating companies to gauge potential stress among borrowers caused by the US-Iran war, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: US Strikes Iran Targets as Trump Hails Progress on Talks
title_cn: 特朗普称赞会谈取得进展，美国袭击伊朗目标
summary: US and Israeli jets struck Iranian vessels in the Strait of Hormuz and other targets, hours after President Donald Trump had suggested negotiations with Tehran over an interim deal were progressing. Bloomberg's Joumanna Bercetche has the latest. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Russia Tells US to Evacuate Citizens, Diplomats From Kyiv
title_cn: 俄罗斯要求美国从基辅撤离公民和外交官
summary: Russian Foreign Minister Sergei Lavrov advised US State Secretary Marco Rubio to evacuate US citizens and diplomats from Kyiv, as the Kremlin plans to continue heavy strikes on the Ukrainian capital, according to a statement published by the Russian Foreign Ministry Monday. Bloomberg's Anthony Halpin reports. (Source: Bloomberg)
